name: octo-apm-platform-workflows
description: Trace Explorer query for workflow gateway, load profiles, browser runner, async worker, cache, object pipeline, edge fuzz, and remediator traces.
queryText: show (traces) TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, TraceDuration as Duration, ErrorCount as "Span Errors" where ServiceName in ('octo-workflow-gateway','octo-workflow-gateway-oke','octo-load-control','octo-browser-runner','octo-async-worker','octo-cache','octo-object-pipeline','octo-remediator','octo-edge-fuzz')
